bio: Computer Science graduate and full-stack developer based in Petaling Jaya, Malaysia, with 2+ years of hands-on experience building for the web.
Currently at Heyjom, where I build white-label, multi-tenant SaaS with Next.js, React, and TypeScript — backed by Laravel and Node.js (Express, Hono).
I care about clean architecture, thoughtful UIs, and the occasional homelab rabbit hole — self-hosting on Linux with Nginx, Cloudflare Tunnel, and Tailscale.
fun_facts: 2A yo-yo practitioner — two hands, two yo-yos 🪀
Specialized in Big Data Analytics at UiTM 🎓
